title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Big Mom, Unknown person #1, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd never be able to make that much lightning with just the Clima-tact!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That blast...they might have all been completely destroyed, no?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She should have taken a direct hit from that bolt...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: proba- by at the bottom of that huge hole...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't tell me... that's her voice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is she going to climb up here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is the hole too deep for her to climb up?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: During one of her eating fits,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way... she's go- ing to tear through the earth itself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You have it don't you... you fools!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hell was all that?! You tried to trick us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I told you! We should have

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just tied her up when we had the chance!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 41 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
